title: Les tricheurs
writer: Marcel Carné, Jacques Sigurd, Charles Spaak
actors: Pascale Petit, Andréa Parisy, Jacques Charrier
plot: Bob Letellier, a good looking rich kid who studies science, makes the acquaintance of Alain, a cynical and immoral young man. The latter introduces him to the existentialist circles of Saint-Germain-des-Prés. Bob is invited to a p...
